research_gate: GP0 is structurally verified and the owner authorized GP1. The readiness record fixes one shared six-phase loop and adversarial matrix; historical code, runtime claims and unadjudicated feature breadth remain evidence only.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized GP1 engine-neutral deterministic base loop, stable stops, recovery and fixed-fixture verification only. No GP2, graphics, runtime, persistence, procedural breadth, grind, network, monetization, publishing, Greenfield dependency or C3B authority.
context_health: GP0 is structurally closed without gameplay-system promotion; GP1 is independently and completely verified as a capability-free fixed-loop proof and remains the sole active owner-review checkpoint; GP2 remains gated.

macro_findings: Mind Warp game is the first product customer; GP0 is structurally verified, GP1 is closed at the fixed-loop proof boundary, and GP2 remains gated.
C3A is sufficient for this product-design route; C3B remains blocked and nonconflated.
Yard Atlas and Companion retain independent product authority.
micro_findings: The downstream code-facing seam is exactly WorldGenerationInput, CausalWorldPacket v1 and validate_world_packet.
Fourteen focused tests cover strict codecs, corrected sessions, deterministic reducer/history, hostile state, predecessor-sensitive S5 and foreign-packet rejection.
The selected GP1 contract is one shared prepare-depart-encounter-consequence-return-remembered-response loop with typed recovery and stable stops.
No physical, optical, graphics, runtime, grind, network, Greenfield or presentation implementation is admitted by GP1.
Seven GP1 tests and all fourteen retained GP0 tests pass; workspace Rust, module, record-role, route and independent hostile review are green.

visual_quality_gate.rationale: GP1 is a typed in-memory loop package with no admitted visual asset.

tiers_completed.result: GP0 structural closure and the six-phase readiness design define one bounded shared-loop problem.
The readiness record freezes phase, failure, recovery, stable-stop, C3A and later-state invariants before implementation.
Seven GP1 tests prove all five sessions, failure recovery, strict stops, append receipts, exact optional C3A context and S1-to-S5 consequence; fourteen GP0 regressions remain green.
Workspace Rust, module context, record roles, product route and independent review pass without a capability-boundary finding.

simulation_ladder.unresolved_risk: No GP1 proof risk remains open; broader progression and runtime questions belong to separately gated future items.
simulation_ladder.expected_information_gain: Determine whether all five GP0 sessions share one meaningful deterministic loop and whether an S1 choice changes S5 without procedural breadth.
simulation_ladder.estimated_cost: One typed reducer extension, fixed fixture matrix and focused adversarial verifier before workspace integration.
simulation_ladder.regression_guard: No GP2, graphics, runtime, persistence, procedural breadth, grind, network, Greenfield or C3B authority enters GP1.
simulation_ladder.stop_condition: Stop if the shared loop erases typed outcomes, cannot resume exactly, overwrites history, or requires a runtime/progression system.
simulation_ladder.final_integration_gate: One isolated measured complete Forge verification run.

exit_criteria.label: All five GP0 sessions traverse one deterministic prepare, depart, encounter, consequence, return and remembered-response loop.
Typed failure and recovery preserve plan, C3A identity and history; every stable stop has an exact deterministic resume.
At least one earlier decision changes a later fixed session while ordered remembered history remains append-only.
GP1 adds no GP2, graphics, runtime, procedural breadth, grind, network, Greenfield or C3B dependency.

unresolved_risks: GP2 progression and runtime remain explicitly outside this closed GP1 package
evidence_requirements: reuse the exact five GP0 fixtures and typed C3A binding without reinterpretation

prove deterministic failure recovery and resumable stable stops
prove S1 direct bypass or ration changes S5 while history remains append-only
retain GP2 C3B Greenfield graphics runtime grind network and monetization boundaries
verification_plan: write failing six-phase recovery stable-stop and later-state tests from the readiness matrix
implement the smallest pure reducer and strict codec extension
run focused GP1 plus retained GP0 regression tests
obtain independent review then run module workspace and one complete Forge gate
